creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to dewayne from comment #5)

This appears to be a separate issue than those originally reported. We prefer to create a separate issue for that, in order to keep the analysis/comment thread contextually relevant, particularly if/as there's a proposed patch associated with it.

Though preferred, if you don't want to do that, feel free to:

- Update the summary to reflect the issue described in comment 5
- Include the proposed change as an attachment

I'll then unassign myself and re-triage it accordingly.
